# Webuzo Server Setup Documentation

Project: Webuzo Server Setup Documentation

Organization: CORNQ

Primary documentation URL: https://webuzo.cornq.net/

Purpose: Technical documentation for Webuzo server setup, troubleshooting, migration, mail, FTP, database, OpenLiteSpeed, and server administration tasks.

Main topics:
- Webuzo hosting panel administration
- AlmaLinux server setup
- OpenLiteSpeed troubleshooting and cache management
- MySQL and MariaDB configuration
- FTP troubleshooting
- Email configuration and queue management
- User resource limits and permissions
- Backuply permissions
- CyberPanel to Webuzo migration
- Webuzo to Webuzo migration
- Webuzo mirror network information
